title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 532.090 - To be under seal of court
text:
532.090.  To be under seal of court. — All such writs issued by a court shall be under the seal thereof; and if issued by a judge out of court, they shall be signed by such judge.
(RSMo 1939 § 1596) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1432; 1919 § 1882; 1909 § 2447
